# Hard72 Reserved16 ResultPreview1 Contract

## Hard 72
hard compaction block ratio defaults to 0.72 and absolute trigger to 70k so long sessions reclaim earlier

## Reserved 16k
reserved context headroom defaults to 16k tokens for denser usable windows before hard block

## Result preview 1
TUI tool result previews default to 1 line for denser chrome without expand

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/shell/tool-call vitest
